title: Climbing Stairs
coreIdea: Count the number of distinct ways to climb n stairs taking 1 or 2 steps at a time, which follows the same recurrence as Fibonacci since the ways to reach step n equal ways to reach step n-1 plus ways to reach step n-2.
recognitionCues: asks to count number of distinct ways to reach a target using fixed step choices
approach: Track two variables representing ways to reach the previous two steps (starting at 1,1 for steps 0 and 1). For each step from 2 to n, current = prev1 + prev2, then shift the tracking variables forward.
spaceComplexity: O(1) with variable tracking, O(n) with array
